title: Google was the dream job in tech. These workers decided to leave anyway. - Business Insider
summary_full: Google was the dream job in tech. These workers decided to leave anyway.  Business InsiderFrom Google engineer to AI startup founder: How a podcast with 100,000 YouTube views gave 23-year-old Aashna Doshi the confidence to quit Google  The Times of IndiaMeet former Google engineer Aashna Doshi who quit her high-paying job to start a podcast and a startup  The Economic TimesI left a Google job I loved. It was scary to leave, but even scarier to stay.  Business Insider‘Scarier Version Wasn’t Leaving Google’: 23-Year-Old Explains Why She Walked Away From Google Job  News18
